titleStmt.title: SII 25.118: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 118. (A.R. No. 118 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the kitchen in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
The record may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to c. 12th Century. The details of the date of the record viz., year 3, Mithuna 12, Sunday may correspond to 1165 A.D., June 6.

It records the gift of 32 paḻaṅ-kāśu deposited into the treasury of the temple for maintaining a five-eighth (araiyē-araikāl) of a perpetual lamp to the deity Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār by a lady Uyyakkoṇḍāḷ, the wife of a brāhmaṇa named Mōśi-Gaṇapati Vishṇu, son of the kiḻār of Arugandūr in Kulaśēkhara-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Śōḻapāṇḍiya-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kulaśekharadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 vatu mithu
na nāyiṟṟu paṉṉiraṇṭāntiyati nāyiṟṟukkiḻamai nā
ḷ coḻa pāṇṭiya vaḷanāṭṭu kulaśekharaccaturvvedimaṅ
kalattu Arukantūrkiḻār makaṉ mocikaṇapativiṣṇu
viṉ brāhmaṇi Uyyakkoṇṭāḷ cāṉiyeṉ tiru
ttaḷi yāṇṭa nāyaṉāṟkut tirunontāviḷakkuc celva
tāka śrī paṇṭārattoṭukkiṉap paḻaṅkācu 32kku Arai
ye Araikkāl viḷakku candrādityavaṟ celvatāka sabhaiyār rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 25.118 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
